dungeon: GENUINE ROTF Lair of the Marble Colossus run (edited compilation — 'PREVIOUS VIDEO' end cards, LEGENDARY loot overlays). Main boss = Marble Colossus; a Hermit God fight also appears. PRIMARY VALUE: clean bossend frames that DOCUMENT Marble Colossus's attack geometry (the prior Marble Colossus tag disc_E03Je5EgiZQ only had it approximate) + the full lair layout. Corroborates the built Marble Colossus death taunt. No NEW taunts (death line already known/built).
map: DOCUMENTED-from-minimaps+bossends: the LAIR OF THE MARBLE COLOSSUS = a multi-room dungeon — grey stone CORRIDORS connecting BROWN/ORANGE tiled rooms, a PINK/RED-tiled special room (Pillar room), and a COLORFUL 4-QUADRANT puzzle room (blue/green/red/yellow quadrants), all leading to the BOSS ARENA: a large grey HEXAGONAL/octagonal room (checkered grey floor) with scattered pink/red PILLAR structures, fought from the open centre. The HERMIT GOD is a SEPARATE area: a circular BLUE WATER POOL with sandy edges. Choke points = the grey corridors between rooms.

bosses.name: Marble Colossus
phases: fights amid scattered Pillars; 'I feel myself... Slipping... Into the void...' as the death/finale line
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames (bossends, clear): the signature is a LARGE RADIAL RING/NOVA of evenly-spaced BLUE/PURPLE bullets — a big circle (~24-36 bullets) that fills/expands across the hexagonal arena; repeated. PILLARS (pink/red structures) are present as destructible adds. Maps to: Shoot with high count (~24-36), shootAngle ~360/count, radial (no predictive), blue projectile. (Prior tag disc_E03Je5EgiZQ also saw an orange-nova enrage beat -> treat that as a later/secondary phase; this tag cleanly confirms the BLUE RING as the core attack.)
taunts: I feel myself... Slipping... Into the void...
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange boss-coloured 'Marble Colossus'; death line CORROBORATES the prior tag + the built line). Marble Colossus is ALREADY built/enriched -> this tag adds NO new taunt but UPGRADES its attack from 'approx' to DOCUMENTED (blue radial ring/nova ~24-36) + confirms the hexagonal Pillar arena. High confidence (2 independent tags agree on the death line + blue-ring attack).
